goal_text:
You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants.
You are looking for a 'restaurant'. The restaurant should serve 'italian' food and should be in the 'cheap' price range.
The restaurant should be in the 'north'.
Make sure you get 'phone number', 'address', and 'postcode'.
You are also looking for a 'train'. The train should 'arrive by 17:45' and should leave on 'monday'.
The train should depart from 'cambridge' and should go to 'norwich'.
Make sure you get 'departure time', 'travel time', and 'train ID'.Remember. You don't want booking for restaurant. Just get the information and it all done.
Remember. You don't want booking for train. Just get the information and it all done.

message: You are traveling to Cambridge and looking forward to try local restaurants
You are looking for a restaurant. The restaurant should serve italian food and should be in the cheap price range
The restaurant should be in the north
Make sure you get phone number, address, and postcode
You are also looking for a train. The train should arrive by 17:45 and should leave on monday
The train should depart from cambridge and should go to norwich
Make sure you get departure time, travel time, and train ID
